failContext.text:
For <baseline> '
          
          
          
          
            A total of 4,608 respondents are to be reached for the Peacebuilding and Reconciliation survey
              (questionnaire) across the three states: Borno, Adamawa and Yobe. For each state, data collection was
              spread across four Local Government Areas, determined by a criteria that measured the following: -
              Existing peace structures preceding the commencement of the insurgency - Communities affected by the
              insurgency - Communities where some level of post-insurgency stabilisation has returned to The selected
              LGAs include: BORNO STATE: Maiduguri, Bama, Damboa, and Dikwa ADAMAWA STATE: Michika, Gombi, Mubi, Demsa
              YOBE STATE: Damaturu, Potiskum, Gashua, Geidam Therefore, for each state a total of at least 1,536
              respondents, dis-aggregated across the four LGAs per state in 384 respondents per location are to be
              reached. So far, data collection has been concluded in Adamawa and Yobe states, while data collection in
              Borno state has been conducted in Maiduguri and Damboa LGAs, with the two remaining LGAs to be concluded
              in October 2019
            
          
        ' at line: 4705, column: 9

A total of 4,608 respondents are to be reached for the Peacebuilding and Reconciliation survey
              (questionnaire) across the three states: Borno, Adamawa and Yobe. For each state, data collection was
              spread across four Local Government Areas, determined by a criteria that measured the following: -
              Existing peace structures preceding the commencement of the insurgency - Communities affected by the
              insurgency - Communities where some level of post-insurgency stabilisation has returned to The selected
              LGAs include: BORNO STATE: Maiduguri, Bama, Damboa, and Dikwa ADAMAWA STATE: Michika, Gombi, Mubi, Demsa
              YOBE STATE: Damaturu, Potiskum, Gashua, Geidam Therefore, for each state a total of at least 1,536
              respondents, dis-aggregated across the four LGAs per state in 384 respondents per location are to be
              reached. So far, data collection has been concluded in Adamawa and Yobe states, while data collection in
              Borno state has been conducted in Maiduguri and Damboa LGAs, with the two remaining LGAs to be concluded
              in October 2019
